entities.name: GetNetScheduleAccountInformation
entities.description: Retrieves the account name used by the AT service.
entities.syntax:
HRESULT GetNetScheduleAccountInformation(   [in]  LPCWSTR  pwszServerName,
[in]  DWORD    ccAccount,   [out] WCHAR [] wszAccount);

parameters.name: pwszServerName
parameters.description: 一个以 NULL 结尾的宽字符串，表示正在检索其帐户信息的计算机的名称。[in] ccAccount 为 wszAccount 分配的字符数，包括 NULL 终止符。 此值允许的最大长度是最大域名长度加上最大用户名长度加 2，表示为 DNLEN + UNLEN + 2。 (最后两个字符是“”字符和 NULL 终止符。)

parameters.name: wszAccount
parameters.description: 接收帐户信息的宽字符数组，包括 NULL 终止符。

return_value.description: 返回值为 HRESULT。 值 S_OK 指示函数成功，并在 wszAccount 中返回帐户信息。 值 S_FALSE 指示函数成功，并且该帐户是本地系统帐户， (wszAccount) 中不会返回任何信息。 任何其他返回值指示错误条件。

entities.remarks: 若要成功调用 GetNetScheduleAccountInformation 函数，调用方应具有对任务文件夹的读取访问权限，该文件夹通常为 %windir%\tasks 或，如以下注册表设置中定义： HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\SchedulingAgent\TasksFolder 要求

entities.name: NetCreateProvisioningPackage
entities.description: Creates a provisioning package for offline domain join operations. This function is only applicable to writable domain controllers, not read-only domain controllers. After provisioning completes on a writable domain controller and accounts replicate to read-only domain controllers, other parts of the offline join operation do not require access to a domain controller. If successful, returns serialized data in either pPackageBinData or pPackageTextData parameter (whichever is not NULL) for use in offline join operations or as text in unattended setup files. All phases of provisioning are logged to NetSetup.log on the local computer. Provisioning may involve up to three computers: the computer creating the package, requesting the package, and installing the package. NetSetup.log files on all three computers contain diagnostic information. Administrator operations log to %WINDIR%\Debug\NetSetup.log, while non-administrator operations log to %USERPROFILE%\Debug\NetSetup.log.

entities.name: NetErrorLogWrite

entities.name: NetGetAnyDCName

entities.name: NetGroupDelUser

entities.name: NetGroupEnum

entities.name: NetLocalGroupAddMember
entities.description: This function is obsolete. Use NetLocalGroupAddMembers function instead.

entities.name: NetLocalGroupAddMembers
entities.description: Adds one or more members to an existing local group. To remove members from a local group, use NetLocalGroupDelMembers. User account names are limited to 20 characters and group names to 256 characters. Names cannot end with a period or contain commas or the following printable characters: ", /, \, [], :, |, <, >, +, =, ;, ?, *. Names also cannot contain non-printable characters in the range 1-31. For Active Directory programming, consider using ADSI methods like IADsGroup for equivalent functionality.

entities.name: NetLocalGroupDel
entities.description: 从安全数据库中删除本地组帐户及其所有成员。安全数据库是指安全帐户管理器(SAM)数据库，如果是域控制器则删除Active Directory中的对应条目。

entities.name: NetLocalGroupDelMember
entities.description: Deprecated function. Use NetLocalGroupDelMembers instead.

entities.name: NetLocalGroupDelMembers
entities.description: Deletes members from a local group in the security database.

entities.name: NetLocalGroupEnum
entities.description: Retrieves information about each local group account on the specified server.

entities.name: NetLocalGroupGetInfo
entities.description: Retrieves information about a particular local group account on a server.

entities.name: NetLocalGroupGetMembers
entities.description: Retrieves a list of members for a specified local group in the security database (SAM database or Active Directory if domain controller). Members can be users or global groups.

entities.name: NetLocalGroupSetInfo
entities.description: Sets information about a local group account.

entities.name: NetLocalGroupSetMembers
entities.description: 设置指定本地组的成员身份。指定的每个用户或全局组将成为本地组的成员，未指定但当前是本地组成员的用户或全局组将被移除。

entities.name: NetMessageBufferSend
entities.description: NetMessageBufferSend函数将信息的缓冲区发送到已注册的消息别名。从Windows Vista开始不支持此函数，因为不支持Messenger服务。

entities.name: NetMessageNameAdd
entities.description: Adds a message name to the message alias table. [Windows 2000 Professional and Server only, desktop applications]

entities.name: NetMessageNameDel
entities.description: Deletes a message name from the message alias table. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional and Server (desktop apps only).

entities.name: NetMessageNameEnum

entities.name: NetMessageNameGetInfo

entities.name: NetProvisionComputerAccount
entities.description: Creates or reuses a computer account in a domain, collecting all necessary metadata and returning it either in an opaque versioned binary blob or embedded as text in an unattended installation answer file. The offline domain join request operation can use the opaque binary blob, which provides all inputs needed to complete domain join during first boot without requiring any network operations (local state updates). Security Note: The blob returned by NetProvisionComputerAccount contains highly sensitive data and should be secured like plaintext passwords. It includes the computer account password and domain information such as domain name, domain controller names, and domain SID (Security ID). Special care must be taken when physically transferring or transmitting this blob over networks.

entities.name: NetQueryDisplayInformation
entities.description: The NetQueryDisplayInformation function enumerates domain account information. Note that using this function may incur performance costs. For Active Directory programming, consider using IDirectorySearch interface methods for paged domain queries. To enumerate trusted domains, use LsaEnumerateTrustedDomainsEx function. Example code demonstrates retrieving group account information by specifying information level 3 (NET_DISPLAY_GROUP).

entities.name: NetRemoteComputerSupports
entities.description: Determines which optional features are supported by a remote computer. Features may include Unicode support, Remote Procedure Call (RPC) capabilities, and remote administration protocol support. The function establishes a network connection if one does not already exist.

entities.name: NetRemoteTOD
entities.description: 函数从指定的服务器返回一天中的时间信息。

entities.name: NetRenameMachineInDomain

entities.name: NetScheduleJobAdd

entities.name: NetScheduleJobDel
entities.description: Deletes a scheduled job from the job queue. Part of network management functions. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional and Server (desktop apps only).

entities.name: NetScheduleJobEnum
entities.description: Lists the jobs queued on a specified computer. This function requires the Schedule service to be started.

entities.name: NetScheduleJobGetInfo
entities.description: Retrieves information about a scheduled job on a network server. [Deprecated since Windows 8, use Task Scheduler 2.0 interfaces instead]

entities.name: NetServerComputerNameAdd
entities.description: Combines functionality of NetServerTransportEnum and NetServerTransportAddEx functions, allowing specification of emulated server names. On Windows Server 2008 SP1 and Windows Vista SP1, each name registered with Windows remote file server (SRV) is designated as either scoped or non-scoped. Shares added to the system are then attached to either all non-scoped names or a single scoped name.

entities.name: NetServerComputerNameDel
entities.description: Removes a computer name from the list of names supported by the specified server. This function causes the server to stop supporting a computer name that was previously added by the NetServerComputerNameAdd function.

entities.name: NetServerDiskEnum
entities.description: Retrieves a list of disk drives on a server. The function returns an array of three-character strings (drive letter, colon, and terminating null character).

entities.name: NetServerEnum
entities.description: Enumerates all servers of the specified type that are visible in a domain. Requires browser service to be running. If browser service is not found, fails with ERROR_NO_BROWSER_SERVERS_FOUND. For Active Directory programming, consider using ADSI methods instead.

entities.name: NetServerGetInfo
entities.description: 函数检索指定服务器的当前配置信息。

entities.name: NetServerSetInfo
entities.description: Sets operational parameters for a server; can set them individually or collectively. The information is stored in a way that persists after system reinitialization.

entities.name: NetServerTransportAdd
entities.description: Adds transport protocol information for a server. Supported on Windows 2000 Professional and Server [desktop apps only]. Header: lmserver.h (include Lm.h). Library: Netapi32.lib. DLL: Netapi32.dll.

entities.name: NetServerTransportAddEx

entities.name: NetServerTransportDel
entities.description: 取消绑定传输协议与服务器。服务器将无法再使用指定的传输协议（如TCP或XNS）与客户端通信。

entities.name: NetServerTransportEnum

entities.name: NetServiceEnum

entities.name: NetServiceGetInfo
entities.description: 该函数已过时，仅为与16位版本的Windows兼容而保留。新应用程序应使用现代服务函数替代。

entities.name: NetServiceInstall
entities.description: 该函数已过时，仅为保持与16位版本Windows的兼容性而保留。新应用程序应使用服务控制管理器(SCM)API中的现代服务函数替代。

entities.name: NetSetPrimaryComputerName
entities.description: Sets a new primary computer name as part of computer renaming operation. The specified name is removed from the alternate names list and configured as the primary name. The computer account name will be changed to match the primary name. The previous primary computer name will be moved to the alternate computer names list.

entities.name: NetUnjoinDomain
entities.description: Removes a computer from a domain. Minimum supported client: Windows XP [desktop apps only]. Minimum supported server: Windows Server 2003 [desktop apps only]. Header: lmjoin.h (include Lm.h). Library: Netapi32.lib. DLL: Netapi32.dll.

entities.name: NetUseAdd
entities.description: The NetUseAdd function establishes a connection to a remote resource. It can be used with disk devices, printer spooling, or interprocess communication (IPC). The ui1_local member should be NULL when authenticating without redirecting a drive letter or device.
entities.remarks: When ui1_local member is specified as NULL, it requests authentication to the server without redirecting a drive letter or device. Future redirections involving the same server connection will use the password specified in the ui1_password member during the initial NetUseAdd call.

entities.name: NetUseDel
entities.description: Deletes a connection to a shared resource. This function is only applicable to Server Message Block (SMB/LAN Manager workstation) clients. NetUseDel does not support Distributed File System (DFS) shares or other network file systems. To cancel connections using other network providers (such as WebDAV or DFS shares), use WNetCancelConnection2 function. No special group membership is required to call NetUseDel. This function cannot be executed on a remote server except for backward compatibility scenarios.

entities.name: NetUseEnum
entities.description: Lists all current connections between the local computer and resources on remote servers. Can also enumerate network resources or connections using WNetOpenEnum and WNetEnumResource functions.

entities.name: NetUseGetInfo
entities.description: Retrieves information about a connection to a shared resource. Can also use WNetGetConnection function to retrieve the name of the network resource associated with a local device.

entities.name: NetUserAdd
entities.description: The NetUserAdd function adds a user account and assigns a password and privilege level.

entities.name: NetUserChangePassword
NetUserDel
entities.description: Deletes a user account from a server.

entities.name: NetUserEnum
entities.description: 函数将分配数据所需的内存量。 如果在此参数中指定另一个值，它可以限制函数返回的字节数。 如果缓冲区大小不足以容纳所有条目，则函数将返回ERROR_MORE_DATA。 有 关详细信息，请参阅 网络管理功能缓冲区 和 网络管理功能缓冲区长度。[out] entriesread 指向一个值的指针，该值接收实际枚举的元素计数。[out] totalentries 指向一个值的指针，该值接收可能从当前恢复位置枚举的条目总数。 请注意，应用程序应仅将此值视为提示。 如果应用程序正在与 Windows 2000 或更高版本的域控制器通信，则应考虑使用 ADSI LDAP 提供程序 更高效地检索此类数据。 ADSI LDAP 提供程序实现一组支持各种 ADSI 接口的 ADSI 对象。 有关详细信息，请参阅 ADSI 服务提供程序。 LAN 管理器： 如果调用的是运行 LAN Manager 2 的计算机。x， totalentries 参数将始终反映数 据库中的条目总数，无论它在恢复序列中的哪个位置。[in, out] resume_handle 指向一个值的指针，该值包含用于继续现有用户搜索的恢复句柄。 第一次调用时，句柄应为 零，后续调用应保持不变。 如果此参数为 NULL，则不存储任何恢复句柄。
entities.return_value: If the function succeeds, it returns NERR_Success. If the function fails, the return value may be one of the following error codes: ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED, ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER, ERROR_MORE_DATA, ERROR_NOT_ENOUGH_MEMORY, NERR_InvalidComputer, NERR_UserNotFound.

entities.name: NetUserGetGroups
entities.description: Retrieves a list of global groups to which a specified user belongs. This function requires administrator rights.

entities.name: NetUserGetInfo
entities.description: Retrieves information about a specified user account on a server. This function complements NetUserEnum which enumerates user accounts.

entities.name: NetUserGetLocalGroups
entities.description: 函数检索指定用户所属的本地组的列表。

entities.name: NetUserModalsGet
entities.description: Retrieves global information for all users and global groups in the security database (SAM database or Active Directory if on a domain controller).

entities.name: NetUserModalsSet
entities.description: Sets global information for all users and global groups in the security database, which is the Security Accounts Manager (SAM) database or Active Directory on a domain controller.

entities.name: NetUserSetGroups
entities.description: Sets the global group memberships for a specified user account.

entities.name: NetUserSetInfo
entities.description: The NetUserSetInfo function sets user account information on a server.

entities.name: NetValidateName
entities.description: Validates a name according to the specified name type. If NameType parameter is NetSetupMachine, the name passed in lpName parameter must be syntactically correct as a NetBIOS name and must not currently be in use on the network. If NameType parameter is NetSetupWorkgroup, the name passed in lpName parameter must be syntactically correct as a NetBIOS name, must not currently be in use on the network as a unique name, and must differ from the computer name. If NameType parameter is NetSetupDomain, the name passed in lpName parameter must be syntactically correct as a NetBIOS or DNS name and must currently be registered as a domain name.

entities.name: NetValidatePasswordPolicy
entities.description: Validates password policies in Active Directory environments. This function checks password complexity (strength) but does not validate passwords directly against Active Directory accounts. Typical usage includes enforcing strong password selection for web applications or checking password complexity for operations like S/MIME certificate-based public keys. Access control is determined by the security object's ACL.
entities.syntax:
NET_API_STATUS NetValidatePasswordPolicy(
  LPCWSTR ServerName,
  LPVOID Qualifier,
  NET_VALIDATE_PASSWORD_TYPE ValidationType,
  LPVOID InputArg,
  LPVOID *OutputArg
);

entities.name: NetValidatePasswordPolicyFree
entities.description: 释放由 NetValidatePasswordPolicy 函数为 OutputArg 参数分配的内存，该参数是一个 NET_VALIDATE_OUTPUT_ARG 结构。

entities.name: NetWkstaGetInfo
entities.description: Retrieves information about the configuration of a workstation.

entities.name: NetWkstaSetInfo
entities.description: Changes limited members of the WKSTA_INFO_502 structure. If workstation service ignores the member, no error is returned. The workstation service primarily uses registry settings for configuration. NetWkstaUserSetInfo can be used as an alternative to set configuration information on the local system (it calls Local Security Authority). When ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER is returned, parm_err parameter indicates the first invalid member of workstation info structure (prefixed with WKSTA_INFO_ and specified by level parameter).

entities.name: NetWkstaTransportEnum
entities.description: Retrieves information about transport protocols managed by the redirector, which is the software on a client computer that generates file requests to server computers.

entities.name: NetWkstaUserEnum
entities.description: Lists information about all users currently logged on to the workstation. This includes interactive, service, and batch logons.

entities.name: NetWkstaUserGetInfo
entities.description: Retrieves information about the currently logged-on user. This function works locally only. Example demonstrates calling NetWkstaUserGetInfo with information level 1 (WKSTA_USER_INFO_1). If successful, outputs information about the logged-on user and frees allocated memory.

entities.name: NetWkstaUserSetInfo
entities.description: 函数设置有关工作站配置元素的用户特定信息。

entities.name: SetNetScheduleAccountInformation
entities.description: Sets the AT service account name and password. These credentials are used by scheduled jobs created with NetScheduleJobAdd. Note: Starting with Windows 8, GetNetScheduleAccountInformation is no longer available. Use Task Scheduler 2.0 interfaces instead.
entities.syntax:
HRESULT SetNetScheduleAccountInformation(   [in] LPCWSTR pwszServerName,
[in] LPCWSTR pwszAccount,   [in] LPCWSTR pwszPassword);

parameters.name: pwszServerName
parameters.description: 一个以 NULL 结尾的宽字符串，表示正在设置其帐户信息的计算机的名称。[in] pwszAccount 指向帐户的以 NULL 结尾的宽字符串的指针。 若要指定本地系统帐户，请将此参数设置为 NULL。

parameters.name: pwszPassword
parameters.description: 指向密码以 NULL 结尾的宽字符串的指针。 有关保护密码信息的信息，请参阅 处理密码。

return_value.description: Returns HRESULT. S_OK indicates successful account name and password setting. Any other value indicates an error condition.

entities.name: AT_ENUM
entities.description: 结构体包含有关提交的作业的信息。NetScheduleJobEnum函数使用此结构枚举并返回有关整个已提交作业队列的信息。

members.name: JobId
members.description: 已提交 (排队) 作业的作业标识符。 JobTime 类型： DWORD_PTR 指向一天中计划运行作业的时间的指针。 时间是运行计划服务的计算机上的本地时间;它从午夜开始测量，以毫秒为单位。

entities.name: AT_INFO
entities.description: 该结构包含有关计划作业的信息。NetScheduleJobAdd函数在计划作业时使用此结构指定信息，NetScheduleJobGetInfo函数使用此结构检索已提交作业的信息。

members.name: JobTime
members.description: 指向一个值的指针，该值指示计划运行作业的时间。 时间是运行计划服务的计算机上的本地时间;它从午夜开始测量，以毫秒为单位。

entities.name: DSREG_JOIN_INFO
entities.description: 包含有关如何将设备加入Microsoft Azure Active Directory的信息。 DSREG_USER_INFO 包含有关用于将设备加入到Microsoft Azure Active Directory的用户帐户的信息。
entities.syntax: typedef struct _DSREG_JOIN_INFO {   DSREG_JOIN_TYPE joinType;

entities.name: DSREG_USER_INFO
entities.description: 包含用于将设备加入到Microsoft Azure Active Directory(AAD)的用户帐户信息。包含用户邮箱、Passport密钥ID和名称。

entities.name: ERRLOG_OTHER_INFO
entities.description: 结构体包含错误日志信息。向错误日志添加新条目时，NetAlertRaise和NetAlertRaiseEx函数使用此结构。
entities.remarks: 调用应用程序必须为警报消息缓冲区中的所有结构和可变长度数据分配和释放内存。

entities.name: NetAlertRaiseEx
entities.description: [自 Windows Vista 起不支持此函数，因为不支持警报器服务。] 发生特定事件时，NetAlertRaiseEx 函数会通知所有已注册的客户端。可以调用此扩展函数来简化警报消息的发送。

entities.name: GROUP_INFO_0
entities.description: 包含安全数据库中全局组名称的结构体，该数据库可以是安全帐户管理器(SAM)数据库或Active Directory(域控制器情况下)。
entities.remarks: 用户帐户名称限制为 20 个字符，组名限制为 256 个字符。 此外，帐户名称不能以句点结尾，并且不能包含逗号或以下任何可打印字符：“，/，，，[，]，：，|， <，，， >+，=，;，？，*。 名称也不能包含范围 1-31 中的字符，这些字符不可打印。

entities.name: GROUP_INFO_1
entities.description: 包含组信息的结构体，用于指定全局组名称和关联注释。
entities.remarks: 用户帐户名称限制为20个字符，组名称限制为256个字符。帐户名称不能以句点结尾，不能包含逗号或以下字符："、/、\、[、]、:、|、<、>、+、=、;、?、*。也不能包含ASCII 1-31范围内的不可打印字符。

entities.name: GROUP_INFO_1002
entities.description: 包含全局组注释信息的结构体，用于NetGroupSetInfo/NetGroupGetInfo函数

entities.name: GROUP_INFO_1005
entities.description: 包含与全局组关联的资源属性结构体。成员grpi1005_attributes通常硬编码为SE_GROUP_MANDATORY、SE_GROUP_ENABLED和SE_GROUP_ENABLED_BY_DEFAULT。

entities.name: GROUP_INFO_2
entities.description: Contains information about a global group. Note: On Windows XP and later, it's recommended to use GROUP_INFO_3 instead. The structure contains group name, comment, group ID, and attributes.

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回值NERR_Success。 如果函数失败，则返回值可能是以下错误代码之一。 返回代码

entities.name: GROUP_INFO_3
entities.description: 包含有关全局组的详细信息。bufptr参数指向GROUP_INFO_3结构。Windows 2000不支持此级别。指向接收全局组信息结构的缓冲区地址的指针。此数据的格式取决于level参数的值。系统为此缓冲区分配内存。必须调用NetApiBufferFree释放内存。

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回值NERR_Success。 如果函数失败，则返回值可能是以下错误代码之一。 返回代码

entities.name: GROUP_USERS_INFO_0
entities.description: Contains information about group users. Used with NetGroupGetUsers, NetGroupSetUsers, NetUserGetGroups, and NetUserSetGroups functions.
entities.remarks: 如果要调用 NetGroupGetUsers 函数或 NetGroupSetUsers 函数， 则 grui0_name 成员包含指定组成员的用户的名称。 如果要调用 NetUserGetGroups 函数或 NetUserSetGroups 函数， 则 grui0_name 成员包含指定用户所属的全局组的名称。 用户帐户名称限制为 20 个字符，组名限制为 256 个字符。 此外，帐户名称不能以句点结尾，并且不能包含逗号或以下任何可打印字符：“，/，，，[，]，：，|， <，，， >+，=，;，？，*。 名称也不能包含范围 1-31 中的字符，这些字符不可打印。

entities.name: GROUP_USERS_INFO_1
entities.description: 包含全局组成员信息的结构体。

entities.name: LOCALGROUP_INFO_0
entities.description: 包含本地组名称信息的数据结构
entities.remarks: 调用 NetLocalGroupAdd 函数时，此成员指定新本地组的名称。调用 NetLocalGroupSetInfo 函数时，此成员指定现有本地组的新名称。用户帐户名称限制为 20 个字符，组名限制为 256 个字符。此外，帐户名称不能以句点结尾，并且不能包含逗号或以下任何可打印字符：", /, \, [], :, |, <, >, +, =, ;, ?, *。名称也不能包含范围 1-31 中的不可打印字符。

entities.name: LOCALGROUP_INFO_1
entities.description: 包含本地组名称和描述信息的结构体
entities.remarks: 用户帐户名称限制为20个字符，组名限制为256个字符。帐户名称不能以句点结尾，不能包含逗号或以下字符：", /, \, [], :, |, <, >, +, =, ;, ?, *。也不能包含ASCII范围1-31的不可打印字符。

entities.name: LOCALGROUP_INFO_1002
entities.description: 包含本地组注释信息的结构体。成员lgrpi1002_comment是指向Unicode字符串的指针，用于指定与本地组关联的注释。

entities.name: LOCALGROUP_MEMBERS_INFO_0
entities.description: Contains information about a local group member's security identifier (SID). Part of a series of local group member information structures.

entities.name: LOCALGROUP_MEMBERS_INFO_1
entities.description: Contains information about a local group member, including the member's security identifier (SID).
entities.syntax: typedef struct _LOCALGROUP_MEMBERS_INFO_1 {   PSID         lgrmi1_sid;

entities.name: LOCALGROUP_MEMBERS_INFO_2
entities.description: 包含安全标识符(SID)以及与本地组成员关联的账户信息。

entities.name: LOCALGROUP_MEMBERS_INFO_3
entities.description: Structure containing member information for local groups. The format of this data depends on the level parameter value. For more information, see Network Management Function Buffers.
entities.syntax:
typedef struct _LOCALGROUP_MEMBERS_INFO_3 {   LPWSTR lgrmi3_domainandname;
} LOCALGROUP_MEMBERS_INFO_3, *PLOCALGROUP_MEMBERS_INFO_3, *LPLOCALGROUP_MEMBERS_INFO_3;

return_value.description: If the function succeeds, the return value is NERR_Success. If the function fails, the return value may be one of the following error codes: NERR_GroupNotFound, ERROR_ACCESS_DENIED

members.name: lgrmi3_domainandname
members.description: 指向以 null 结尾的 Unicode 字符串的指针，该字符串指定以域名和“”分隔符为前缀的本 地组成员的帐户名称。 例如： syntax <DomainName>\<AccountName> 备注 用户帐户名称限制为 20 个字符，组名限制为 256 个字符。 此外，帐户名称不能以句点结尾，并且不能包含逗号或以下任何可打印字符：“，/，，，[，]，：，|， <，，， >+，=，;，？，*。 名称也不能包含范围 1-31 中的字符，这些字符不可打印。

entities.name: LOCALGROUP_USERS_INFO_0
entities.description: Contains information about local group membership for a user account.
entities.remarks: 用户帐户名称限制为 20 个字符，组名限制为 256 个字符。 此外，帐户名称不能以句点结尾，并且不能包含逗号或以下任何可打印字符：“，/，，，[，]，：，|， <，，， >+，=，;，？，*。 名称也不能包含范围 1-31 中的字符，这些字符不可打印。

entities.name: MSG_INFO_0
entities.description: 结构体指定消息别名信息。

entities.name: MSG_INFO_1
entities.description: 结构体指定消息别名。此结构体仅用于兼容性目的，不支持消息转发。

entities.name: NET_DISPLAY_GROUP
entities.description: Contains information about a group account, including name, comment, group ID, attributes, and next index.

entities.name: NET_DISPLAY_MACHINE
entities.description: 该结构体包含计算机及其属性的信息，可供客户经理访问。

entities.name: NET_DISPLAY_USER
entities.description: 包含用户账户信息的结构体，可供账户管理员访问。

entities.name: NET_VALIDATE_AUTHENTICATION_INPUT_ARG
entities.description: Structure containing authentication validation input arguments
entities.syntax:
typedef struct _NET_VALIDATE_AUTHENTICATION_INPUT_ARG {   NET_VALIDATE_PERSISTED_FIELDS InputPersistedFields;   BOOLEAN                       PasswordMatched;
} NET_VALIDATE_AUTHENTICATION_INPUT_ARG, *PNET_VALIDATE_AUTHENTICATION_INPUT_ARG;

entities.name: NET_VALIDATE_OUTPUT_ARG
entities.description: 包含用户自上次登录以来更改的持久密码相关数据信息，以及密码验证检查结果的结构体
entities.syntax: typedef struct _NET_VALIDATE_OUTPUT_ARG {

entities.name: NET_VALIDATE_PASSWORD_CHANGE_INPUT_ARG
entities.description: Structure containing input arguments for password change validation

entities.name: NET_VALIDATE_PASSWORD_HASH
entities.description: NET_VALIDATE_PASSWORD_HASH 结构包含密码哈希信息，用于密码验证。

members.name: Length
members.description: 指定此结构的长度。 Hash 密码哈希。

entities.name: NET_VALIDATE_PASSWORD_RESET_INPUT_ARG
entities.description: Structure used for password reset validation input arguments. Contains persisted fields, clear password, user account name, hashed password, and flags for password change requirements and lockout clearing.

entities.name: NET_VALIDATE_PERSISTED_FIELDS
entities.description: 包含对永久密码相关信息的更改以及密码验证结果的结构体。应用程序应保留除ValidationStatus之外的所有持久化字段，以便在同一用户对象上再次调用时使用。如果NetValidatePasswordPolicy函数失败(返回非零值)，OutputArg参数将被设置为NULL。
entities.return_value: 如果成功，返回NERR_Success并分配OutputArg参数；如果失败，OutputArg为NULL并返回系统错误代码。

entities.name: NETSETUP_PROVISIONING_PARAMS
entities.description: 为 NetCreateProvisioningPackage 函数提供参数的结构体，支持 Windows 8/Server 2012 的脱机域加入操作。包含域加入配置、证书模板名称数组、机器策略名称数组和策略路径数组等字段。

entities.name: PRINT_OTHER_INFO
entities.description: PRINT_OTHER_INFO结构用于打印作业信息。这些结构可以选择后跟可变长度数据。调用应用程序必须为警报消息缓冲区中的所有结构和可变长度数据分配内存。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_100
entities.description: Contains information about the server, including platform identifier and server name. Windows 2000 Professional [仅限桌面应用] Windows 2000 Server [仅限桌面应用]

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1005
entities.description: 包含服务器注释信息的结构体

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_101
entities.description: 结构体包含有关指定服务器的信息，包括名称、平台、服务器类型和关联的软件。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1010
entities.description: 包含服务器自动断开连接时间配置的结构体

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1016
entities.description: 包含服务器可见性信息的结构体，sv1016_hidden成员指定服务器是否对同一网络域中的其他计算机可见

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1017
entities.description: SERVER_INFO_1017结构体包含服务器网络公告速率设置

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1018
entities.description: Contains server announcement delta information. Minimum supported client: Windows 2000 Professional [desktop apps only]. Minimum supported server: Windows 2000 Server [desktop apps only]. Header: lmserver.h (include Lm.h)
entities.syntax:
typedef struct _SERVER_INFO_1018 {   DWORD sv1018_anndelta;
} SERVER_INFO_1018, *PSERVER_INFO_1018, *LPSERVER_INFO_1018; 成员
sv1018_anndelta
指定报出速率的增量值（以毫秒为单位）。 此值指定报出率与 svX_announce 成员中指定的时间段的不同程度。
增量值允许随机变化的报出率。 例如，如果 svX_announce 成员的值为 10，而
svX_anndelta 成员的值为 1，则报出速率可能从 9.999 秒到 10.001 秒不等。 有关详细信
息，请参阅 SERVER_INFO_102 和 SERVER_INFO_1017。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_102
entities.description: 结构包含有关指定服务器的信息，包括名称、平台、服务器类型、属性和关联的软件。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1107
entities.description: 指定可以同时登录到服务器的最大用户数

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1501
entities.description: 指定服务器上单个会话中可以打开的文件数量限制

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1502
entities.description: 指定服务器每个客户端的最大虚拟线路数。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1503
entities.description: 指定可以同时执行的搜索操作数的服务器信息结构

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1506
entities.description: 包含服务器可分配的最大工作项数的结构体。成员sv1506_maxworkitems指定最大接收缓冲区数或工作项数，达到限制时会触发传输协议流控制。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1509
entities.description: 包含sv1509_maxrawbuflen成员的结构体，用于指定原始模式缓冲区的最大字节数

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1510
entities.description: 结构指定可以使用单个虚拟线路登录到指定服务器的最大用户数。

members.name: sv1510_sessusers
members.description: 指定可以使用单个虚拟线路登录到服务器的最大用户数。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1511
entities.description: 指定用户可以使用单个虚拟线路建立的最大树连接数。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1512
entities.description: 包含服务器可以分配的非分页内存最大大小的配置信息

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1513
entities.description: 包含服务器在任何特定时间可以分配的可分页内存的最大大小设置

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1515
entities.description: 该结构体指定服务器是否应在客户端登录时间过期后强制客户端断开连接，即使客户端仍有打开的文件。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1516
entities.description: 该结构体指定服务器是否为可靠的时间源，包含一个BOOL类型成员sv1516_timesource。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1518
entities.description: 结构体指定服务器是否对LAN Manager 2.x客户端可见

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1523
entities.description: 指定服务器保留有关不完整搜索操作的信息的时间长度。包含一个DWORD类型成员sv1523_maxkeepsearch。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1528
entities.description: 指定清除程序在唤醒服务请求之前保持空闲的时间段（以秒为单位）。较小的值可改善服务器响应但会增加CPU消耗。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1529
entities.description: 结构指定服务器在开始分配更多项目之前所需的最小免费接收工作项数。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1530
entities.description: 指定服务器开始处理服务器消息块(SMB)所需的最小可用接收工作项数

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1533
entities.description: 指定客户端可以发送到服务器的最大未完成请求数。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1536
entities.description: 结构指定服务器是否允许客户端在文件上使用机会锁 (oplock) 。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1538
entities.description: Specifies whether multiple MS-DOS File Control Blocks (FCBs) should be placed in a single location.

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1539
entities.description: 指定服务器是否处理原始服务器消息块(SMB)的结构

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1540
entities.description: 指定服务器是否允许共享重定向的服务器驱动器

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1541
entities.description: 指定服务器为处理客户端连接到服务器的突发请求而保留的最小可用连接块数。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1542
entities.description: 指定服务器为处理客户端连接突发请求而保留的最大可用连接块数。包含一个成员sv1542_maxfreeconnections表示每个终结点维护的最大可用连接块数。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1544
entities.description: 指定要在连接表中分配的初始树连接数。服务器会根据需要自动增加表，因此将此值设置为更高是一种优化。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1550
entities.description: 结构指定发送警报消息之前剩余的可用磁盘空间的百分比。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_1552
entities.description: 指定服务器链接延迟的最大允许时间（秒）。超过此阈值时服务器将禁用该连接的原始I/O。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_402
entities.description: 结构包含有关指定服务器的信息。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_403
entities.description: 结构包含有关指定服务器的信息。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_502
entities.description: 包含有关指定服务器的信息的结构体(已过时)。

entities.name: SERVER_INFO_503
entities.description: 包含服务器配置和性能信息的结构体。该结构体已过时，建议使用更新的替代方案。

entities.name: SERVER_TRANSPORT_INFO_0
entities.description: 包含服务器传输协议信息的结构体，用于将服务器绑定到传输协议。
entities.remarks: netServerTransportAdd 或 NetServerTransportAddEx 函数使用 SERVER_TRANSPORT_INFO_0 结构将指定的服务器绑定到传输协议。

entities.name: SERVER_TRANSPORT_INFO_1
entities.description: SERVER_TRANSPORT_INFO_1结构用于描述服务器传输信息。如果传输地址长度成员为零或大于MAX_PATH定义，或包含非法值，会返回错误。只有管理员或服务器操作员本地组的成员才能成功执行相关操作。
entities.remarks: netServerTransportAddEx 函数使用 SERVER_TRANSPORT_INFO_1 结构将指定的服务器 绑定到传输协议。

entities.name: SERVER_TRANSPORT_INFO_2
entities.description: SERVER_TRANSPORT_INFO_2结构包含服务器传输信息。当在SERVER_TRANSPORT_INFO_2或SERVER_TRANSPORT_INFO_3结构的svti2_servername成员中指定SVTI2_SCOPED_NAME标志时使用。NetShareDelEx函数用于删除限定范围的共享，NetShareGetInfo和NetShareSetInfo函数用于获取和设置有关作用域共享的信息。作用域终结点通常由群集命名空间使用。

entities.name: SERVER_TRANSPORT_INFO_3
entities.description: Contains transport information for a server. When the SVTI2_SCOPED_NAME bit is set in the svti3_flags member, the corresponding server name can be used.

entities.name: STD_ALERT
entities.description: 结构包含发生重大事件的时间和日期。结构还包含警报类和引发警报消息的应用程序的名称。在使用NetAlertRaise函数发送警报消息时，必须指定STD_ALERT结构。

entities.name: TIME_OF_DAY_INFO
entities.description: 包含远程服务器中有关一天中的时间信息的结构体

entities.name: USE_INFO_0
entities.description: Contains information about the connection between a local device and a shared resource.

entities.name: USE_INFO_1
entities.description: 结构包含有关本地设备和共享资源之间的连接的信息。该信息包括连接状态和连接类型。

entities.name: USE_INFO_2
entities.description: Contains information about the connection to a shared resource (USE_INFO_2 structure)
entities.syntax:
typedef struct _USE_INFO_2 {
LMSTR ui2_local;   LMSTR ui2_remote;
LMSTR ui2_password;   DWORD ui2_status;   DWORD ui2_asg_type;   DWORD ui2_refcount;   DWORD ui2_usecount;   LMSTR ui2_username;   LMSTR ui2_domainname;
} USE_INFO_2, *PUSE_INFO_2, *LPUSE_INFO_2;
成员 ui2_local
类型： LMSTR
指向包含本地设备名称 (的字符串的指针，例如，驱动器 E 或 LPT1) 重定向到共享资源。常量 DEVLEN 指定字符串中的最大字符数。 此成员可以为 NULL。 有关更多信息，请参见下面的“备注”部分。
如果定义了 _WIN32_WINNT 或 FORCE_UNICODE ，则此字符串为 Unicode。

\\servername\sharename
如果定义了 _WIN32_WINNT 或 FORCE_UNICODE ，则此字符串为 Unicode。
ui2_password 类型： LMSTR

如果定义了 _WIN32_WINNT 或 FORCE_UNICODE ，则此字符串为 Unicode。 ui2_status
类型：DWORD

entities.name: USE_INFO_3
entities.description: 结构体包含有关本地计算机与共享资源之间的连接信息，包括连接类型、连接状态、用户名、域名以及描述连接行为的特定标志。
entities.syntax: typedef struct _USE_INFO_3 {

entities.name: USER_INFO_0
entities.description: 包含用户帐户名称信息的结构体
entities.remarks: 用户帐户名称限制为20个字符。名称不能以句点结尾，不能包含逗号或以下字符：", /, \, [], :, |, <, >, +, =, ;, ?, *。也不能包含ASCII范围1-31的不可打印字符。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1
entities.description: Contains information about a user account, including name, password, home directory, and flags.

entities.name: USER_INFO_10
entities.description: 结构体包含有关用户帐户的信息，包括帐户名称、与帐户关联的注释以及用户的全名。
entities.remarks: 用户帐户名称限制为 20 个字符，组名称限制为 256 个字符。 此外，帐户名称不能以句点结尾，并且不能包含逗号或以下任何可打印字符：“、、/、、[、]、：、|、 <、、 >、 +、=、;、？、*。 名称也不能包含 1-31 范围内的字符，这些字符不可打印。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1003
entities.description: 结构包含用户密码。 仅当调用 NetUserSetInfo 函数时，此信息级别才有效。
entities.remarks: 按照惯例，密码长度限制为LM20_PWLEN个字符。实际最大长度为PWLEN字节。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1005
entities.description: 结构包含要分配给用户网络帐户的权限级别。 仅当调用 NetUserSetInfo 函数时， 此信息级别才有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1006
entities.description: 包含用户主目录路径的结构体。仅在调用NetUserSetInfo函数时有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1007
entities.description: 结构包含与用户网络帐户关联的注释。 仅当调用 NetUserSetInfo 函数时，此信息 级别才有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1008
entities.description: USER_INFO_1008结构体包含usri1008_flags成员，用于指定用户账户标志。可与NetUserSetInfo函数一起使用来设置用户账户属性。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1009
entities.description: 包含用户登录脚本文件路径的结构体，仅在调用NetUserSetInfo函数时有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1010
entities.description: 结构包含一组位标志，用于定义分配给用户网络帐户的操作员权限。此结构体用于 NetUserSetInfo 函数的特定信息级别。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1011
entities.description: 包含网络用户全名的结构体。仅在调用NetUserSetInfo函数时有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1012
entities.description: 包含用户注释信息的结构体。仅在调用 NetUserSetInfo 函数时有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1013
entities.description: 包含网络帐户的保留信息结构。仅当调用 NetUserSetInfo 函数时，此信息级别才有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1014
entities.description: 结构包含用户可以从中登录的工作站的名称。仅当调用NetUserSetInfo函数时此信息级别才有效。不应再使用usri1014_workstations成员，建议改用用户权限分配设置来控制登录访问。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1017
entities.description: 包含网络用户帐户过期信息的结构体。仅当调用NetUserSetInfo函数时此信息级别有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1018
entities.description: 包含网络用户帐户可用的最大磁盘空间量的结构体。仅当调用 NetUserSetInfo 函数时有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1020
entities.description: 包含用户可以登录到网络的时间信息。仅当调用 NetUserSetInfo 函数时此信息级别有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1023
entities.description: 包含网络登录请求应发送到的服务器名称的结构体。仅当调用NetUserSetInfo函数时有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1024
entities.description: 包含网络用户所选语言的国家/地区代码。仅当调用 NetUserSetInfo 函数时此信息级别才有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1025
entities.description: 结构体包含网络用户所选语言的代码页。仅当调用NetUserSetInfo函数时，此信息级别才有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1051
entities.description: 包含用户帐户主要组RID(相对ID)的结构体，仅适用于NetUserSetInfo函数调用

entities.name: USER_INFO_1052
entities.description: 包含网络用户配置文件路径的结构体。仅在调用NetUserSetInfo函数时有效。

entities.name: USER_INFO_1053
entities.description: 包含网络帐户用户信息的结构体，仅在调用NetUserSetInfo函数时有效。成员usri1053_home_dir_drive指定分配给用户主目录的登录驱动器号。

entities.name: USER_INFO_11
entities.description: 结构包含有关用户帐户的信息，包括帐户名称、特权级别、用户主目录的路径以及 其他与用户相关的网络统计信息。

entities.name: USER_INFO_2
entities.description: 包含用户账户信息的结构体，用于NetUserAdd和NetUserSetInfo等函数。包含用户名、密码、权限级别、主目录等字段。

entities.name: USER_INFO_21
entities.description: 包含单向加密的LAN Manager 2.x兼容密码的结构体

entities.name: USER_INFO_22
entities.description: Structure containing information about a user account, including account name, privilege level, path to user's home directory, LAN Manager 2.x compatible encrypted password, and other user-related network statistics.

entities.name: USER_INFO_24
entities.description: 包含连接到Internet标识的用户帐户信息，包括Internet提供程序名称、Internet主体名称和安全标识符(SID)。
entities.remarks: 登录 Windows 的用户帐户可以连接到 Internet 标识。 用户帐户可以是计算机上的本地帐 户，也可以是已加入域的计算机的域帐户。 USER_INFO_24结构用于提供有关连接到 Internet 标识的帐户的信息。 在Windows 8和Windows Server 2012，通常可以使用已连接帐户的 Internet 标识而不是 计算机帐户。

entities.name: USER_INFO_3
entities.description: The USER_INFO_3 structure contains information about a user account, including name, password, home directory, and account flags. It can be used with NetUserAdd, NetUserEnum, NetUserSetInfo and NetUserGetInfo functions. Note: USER_INFO_4 structure replaces USER_INFO_3 on Windows XP and later.

entities.name: USER_INFO_4
entities.description: 结构可与 NetUserAdd、NetUserSetInfo 和 NetUserGetInfo 函数一起使用。用户帐户名称限制为 20 个字符，组名限制为 256 个字符。此外，帐户名称不能以句点结尾，并且不能包含逗号或以下任何可打印字符：", /, \, [], :, |, <, >, +, =, ;, ?, *。名称也不能包含范围 1-31 中的字符，这些字符不可打印。请注意，USER_INFO_4 结构取代了 Windows XP 及更高版本上的早期版本。

entities.name: USER_MODALS_INFO_0
entities.description: Contains information about the minimum and maximum password age, minimum password length, and forced logoff time for users.

entities.name: USER_MODALS_INFO_1
entities.description: 包含登录服务器和域控制器信息的结构体，用于用户模式信息级别1。

entities.name: USER_MODALS_INFO_1001
entities.description: Contains information about the minimum password length for user accounts.

entities.name: USER_MODALS_INFO_1002
entities.description: 包含安全数据库中密码最长持续时间的结构体，用于安全帐户管理器(SAM)数据库或Active Directory(域控制器)。

entities.name: USER_MODALS_INFO_1003
entities.description: 结构体包含安全数据库中密码的最短持续时间，安全数据库是安全帐户管理器(SAM)数据库，如果是域控制器，则为Active Directory。

entities.name: USER_MODALS_INFO_1004
entities.description: 包含安全数据库中用户和全局组的强制注销信息，安全数据库是安全帐户管理器(SAM)数据库，如果是域控制器，则为Active Directory。

entities.name: USER_MODALS_INFO_1005
entities.description: 该结构体包含安全数据库中用户和全局组的密码历史记录信息。安全数据库指安全帐户管理器(SAM)数据库，对于域控制器则是Active Directory。

entities.name: USER_MODALS_INFO_1006
entities.description: 包含登录服务器角色信息的结构体。usrmod1006_role成员指定登录服务器的角色。

entities.name: USER_MODALS_INFO_1007
entities.description: 包含域控制器信息的结构体，用于指定用户帐户管理器存储数据库主副本的域控制器名称。

entities.name: USER_MODALS_INFO_2
entities.description: 包含安全帐户管理器(SAM)域名和标识符的结构体。用于存储域控制器或工作站的域名及其安全标识符(SID)。

entities.name: USER_MODALS_INFO_3
entities.description: 包含安全数据库中用户和全局组的锁定信息结构，安全数据库是安全帐户管理器(SAM)数据库，如果是域控制器则为Active Directory。

entities.name: USER_OTHER_INFO
entities.description: 包含警报消息中的其他数据。缓冲区必须包含所有必需的可变长度信息。调用应用程序负责内存分配和释放。

return_value.description: 如果函数成功，则返回值NERR_Success。 如果函数失败，则返回值为系统错误代码，可以是以下错误代码之一。 有关所有可能的错误代码的列表，请参阅 系统错误代码。 返回代码

entities.remarks: 其他可变长度数据遵循警报消息缓冲区中的 USER_OTHER_INFO 结构。 信息采用连续 null 结尾的字符串形式，如下所示。 String username computername 含义 创建会话的用户。创建会话的计算机。 调用应用程序必须为警报消息缓冲区中的所有结构和可变长度数据分配和释放内存。有关演示如何引发用户警报的代码示例，请参阅 NetAlertRaiseEx 。

entities.name: WKSTA_INFO_100
entities.description: 包含工作站环境信息的结构体，包括平台标识符、计算机名、工作组名以及操作系统版本信息。

entities.name: WKSTA_INFO_101
entities.description: 包含有关工作站环境的信息，包括特定于平台的信息、域和本地计算机的名称，以及有关操作系统的信息。

entities.name: WKSTA_INFO_502
entities.description: Contains information about the workstation environment, including configuration parameters for network operations.

members.name: wki502_force_core_create_mode
members.description: wki502_use_512_byte_max_transfer 类型： BOOL 保留。

entities.name: WKSTA_TRANSPORT_INFO_0
entities.description: Contains information about a transport protocol used by the workstation service. Supported on Windows 2000 and later. Header: lmwksta.h (include Lm.h). Library: Netapi32.lib. DLL: Netapi32.dll.

members.name: wkti0_quality_of_service
members.description: 指定一个值，该值确定传输协议相对于其他传输协议的搜索顺序。 首先搜索最大值。 wkti0_number_of_vcs 指定使用此传输协议与服务器通信的客户端数。 wkti0_transport_name 指定传输协议的设备名称。 wkti0_transport_address 指定此传输协议上的服务器的地址。 如果定义了 _WIN32_WINNT 或 FORCE_UNICODE ，则此字符串为 Unicode。 wkti0_wan_ish

entities.name: WKSTA_USER_INFO_0
entities.description: Contains information about a workstation user. Supported on Windows 2000 Server and later. Header: lmwksta.h (include Lm.h). Library: Netapi32.lib. DLL: Netapi32.dll.

entities.name: WKSTA_USER_INFO_1
entities.description: 结构包含与特定工作站相关的用户信息。 该信息包括当前用户的名称以及工作站访问的域。

entities.name: WKSTA_USER_INFO_1101
entities.description: Contains a space-separated list of domains in the wkui1101_oth_domains member. An empty list is valid. A NULL pointer indicates the member should remain unmodified. The wkui1101_oth_domains member cannot be set using MS-DOS. If the name list is invalid or names cannot be added to network adapters managed by the system, NetWkstaUserSetInfo will reject the request. When NetWkstaUserSetInfo returns ERROR_INVALID_PARAMETER, the parm_err parameter indicates which member of the workstation user information structure is invalid.

entities.name: SCHED_E_ACCOUNT_NAME_NOT_FOUND
entities.description: HRESULT error code (0x80041310) indicating account name not found or invalid credentials. Returned when: 1) caller is not administrator, 2) specified account credentials are invalid, 3) password is NULL/too long, or 4) specified account does not exist.

entities.name: NetEnumerateServiceAccounts
entities.description: Enumerates standalone managed service accounts (sMSA) on a specified server.

entities.name: MSA_INFO_0
entities.description: Contains information about a Managed Service Account.

entities.name: NETLOGON_INFO_1
entities.description: Contains response data from a domain controller for NetLogon control queries at level 1. Higher level responses are defined in NETLOGON_INFO_2, NETLOGON_INFO_3, and NETLOGON_INFO_4 structures.

entities.name: MSA_INFO_LEVEL
entities.description: Specifies the level of a managed service account. MSA_INFO_STATE indicates the state of a managed service account.

entities.name: SE_GROUP_ENABLED_BY_DEFAULT
entities.description: Specifies that the group is enabled by default. For more information, see TOKEN_GROUPS.
entities.remarks: User account names are limited to 20 characters and group names are limited to 256 characters. Additionally, account names cannot end with a period and cannot contain commas or any of the following printable characters: ", /, \, [], :, |, <, >, +, =, ;, ?, *. Names also cannot contain characters in the range 1-31, which are non-printable.

entities.name: SE_GROUP_MANDATORY
entities.description: Specifies that the group is mandatory and cannot be disabled

entities.name: SE_GROUP_ENABLED
entities.description: Specifies that the group is enabled for use

entities.name: SE_GROUP_OWNER
entities.description: 0x00000008 - 标识该组是令牌用户的组所有者账户。默认情况下该组在访问检查时是启用的。

entities.name: SE_GROUP_USE_FOR_DENY_ONLY
entities.description: Specifies that the group is enabled for deny-only in access checks

entities.name: SE_GROUP_INTEGRITY
entities.description: Specifies the integrity level of the security identifier (SID). This flag is used in SID attributes.

entities.name: SE_GROUP_INTEGRITY_ENABLED
entities.description: Specifies that the group is enabled for integrity checks. This flag is used in security descriptor structures.

entities.name: SE_GROUP_LOGON_ID
entities.description: Specifies that the SID is a logon ID SID (Security Identifier). This is a group attribute used in SID_AND_ATTRIBUTES structures.

entities.name: SE_GROUP_RESOURCE
entities.description: 0x20000000. Specifies that the group is used for deny-only purposes. When this attribute is set, the SE_GROUP_ENABLED attribute must not be set. This attribute is available on Windows Vista and later.

entities.name: SID_NAME_USE
entities.description: Specifies the account type associated with a security identifier (SID). Valid values include: SidTypeUser, SidTypeGroup, SidTypeDomain, SidTypeAlias, SidTypeWellKnownGroup, SidTypeDeletedAccount, SidTypeInvalid, SidTypeUnknown, SidTypeComputer.

entities.name: SidTypeUser
entities.description: Specifies that the SID is a user SID

entities.name: SidTypeWellKnownGroup
entities.description: 表示SID类型为众所周知的组帐户(例如Everyone)。有关详细信息，请参阅已知SID。

entities.name: SidTypeDeletedAccount
entities.description: Represents a SID type for a deleted account. The account type cannot be determined because the account has been deleted.

entities.name: UF_SCRIPT
entities.description: 标识执行的登录脚本。必须设置此值。用户的帐户已禁用。

entities.name: UF_ACCOUNTDISABLE
entities.description: Account is disabled

entities.name: UF_PASSWD_CANT_CHANGE
entities.description: UF_LOCKOUT

entities.name: UF_TRUSTED_FOR_DELEGATION
entities.description: User account control flag indicating the account is trusted for delegation

entities.name: UF_ENCRYPTED_TEXT_PASSWORD_ALLOWED
entities.description: Flag indicating encrypted text passwords are allowed for the account

entities.name: UF_DONT_REQUIRE_PREAUTH
entities.description: Flag indicating that pre-authentication is not required for the account.

entities.name: UF_TRUSTED_TO_AUTHENTICATE_FOR_DELEGATION
entities.description: 将帐户标记为受信任以进行委派身份验证。这是一个安全敏感设置，允许服务采用客户端标识并向其他服务进行身份验证。Windows 2000/XP不支持此值。

entities.name: UF_WORKSTATION_TRUST_ACCOUNT
entities.description: Specifies that the account is a computer account for a workstation

entities.name: UF_INTERDOMAIN_TRUST_ACCOUNT
entities.description: Indicates an inter-domain trust account. This is a permit for a domain that trusts other domains.
entities.remarks: User account names are limited to 20 characters. Names cannot end with a period or contain certain special characters.

entities.name: NET_VALIDATE_AUTHENTICATION_INPU
entities.description: 当应用程序请求身份验证验证时，客户端应用程序会使用此结构体

entities.name: InputPersistedFields
entities.description: 指定一个 NET_VALIDATE_PERSISTED_FIELDS 结构，该结构包含有关登录帐户的持久密码 相关信息。 ClearPassword 指向以纯文本格式指定新密码的 Unicode 字符串的指针。 UserAccountName 指向指定用户帐户名称的 Unicode 字符串的指针。 HashedPassword 指定包含新密码哈希 的 NET_VALIDATE_PASSWORD_HASH 结构。 PasswordMustChangeAtNextLogon 指示用户下次登录时是否必须更改其密码的 BOOLEAN 值。 如果此参数为 TRUE，则用户 必须在下次登录时更改密码。 ClearLockout 可以重置用户帐户的“锁定状态”的 BOOLEAN 值。 如果此成员为 TRUE，则不再锁定该帐户。请注意，应用程序无法直接锁定帐户。 帐户只能因超过帐户允许的最大无效密码身 份验证数而被锁定。

entities.name: PasswordMatched
entities.description: 指示客户端应用程序对用户提供的密码进行身份验证结果的布尔值。如果为FALSE，表示密码尚未通过验证。

entities.name: ChangedPersistedFields
entities.description: Specifies the result of password validation checks performed by the NetValidatePasswordPolicy function. The status depends on the value specified in the ValidationType parameter of the function.

entities.name: NET_VALIDATE_PASSWORD_LAST_SET
entities.description: Specifies when the password was last set

entities.name: BadPasswordCount
entities.description: ULONG类型，表示用户尝试使用错误密码登录帐户的次数

entities.name: NET_VALIDATE_PASSWORD_HISTORY_LENGTH
entities.description: Specifies the password history length validation policy in Windows networking.

entities.name: PasswordHistoryLength
entities.description: Specifies the password history length setting for an account.

entities.name: BadPasswordTime
entities.description: FILETIME类型，表示用户尝试使用错误密码登录帐户时的GMT日期和时间。当错误的密码登录次数超过允许的数量时，会发生锁定。

entities.name: PasswordHistory
entities.description: Contains password hashes in the history list. Points to NET_VALIDATE_PASSWORD_HASH structure.
entities.remarks: 请注意，应用程序负责保存所有已更改的永久性数据以及任何用户对象信息。 下次应用程序在用户对象的同一实例上调用 NetValidatePasswordPolicy 时，应用程序必须提供持 久信息中的必填字段。

entities.name: NetAccessGetUserPerms
entities.description: [此函数已过时。 有关备用函数的列表，请参阅 授权函数。] 不支持。

entities.name: ERROR_NO_LOGON_SERVERS
entities.description: There are currently no logon servers available to service the logon request.

entities.name: ERROR_DOMAIN_TRUST_INCONSISTENT
entities.description: 指定的域不是受信任的域。信任关系的客户端或服务器端可能已中断，或者密码断开。响应的服务器不是指定域的正确域控制器。

entities.name: NERR_DC
entities.description: Network error code indicating domain controller not found (equivalent to ERROR_BAD_NETPATH)

entities.name: ERROR_INVALID_LEVEL
entities.description: 为级别参数指定的值无效。

entities.name: GROUP_COMMENT_PARMNUM
entities.description: Specifies the comment parameter number for group attributes

entities.name: ERROR_NO_SUCH_MEMBER
entities.description: The specified member does not exist in the group.
entities.remarks: This error occurs when trying to add a member to a local group where the specified member does not exist. The operation will fail in this case.

entities.name: ERROR_MEMBER_NOT_IN_ALIAS
entities.description: The specified member is not a member of the alias.

entities.name: ERROR_NO_SUCH_ALIAS
entities.description: 指定的别名不存在。

entities.name: LsaEnumerateTrustedDomains

entities.name: SV_SHARESECURITY
entities.description:
SV_SHARESECURITY structure contains information about server share security settings. Fields include:
- sv403_numadmin: DWORD - Maximum number of administrators the server can accommodate
- sv403_lanmask: DWORD - Network device driver provisioning order
- sv403_guestacct: LPWSTR - Pointer to Unicode string specifying guest account name (max length UNLEN)
- sv403_chdevs: DWORD - Number of character devices that can be shared
- sv403_chdevq: DWORD - Number of character device queues that can coexist
- sv403_chdevjobs: DWORD - Maximum pending character device jobs
- sv403_connections: DWORD - Allowed number of connections
- sv403_shares: DWORD - Maximum number of share names
- sv403_openfiles: DWORD - Maximum simultaneously open files
- sv403_sessopens: DWORD - Files a session can open
- sv403_sessvcs: DWORD - Maximum virtual circuits per client
- sv403_sessreqs: DWORD - Simultaneous requests per virtual circuit
- sv403_opensearch: DWORD - Concurrent search operations
- sv403_activelocks: DWORD - Simultaneous active file locks
- sv403_numreqbuf: DWORD - Number of server buffers
- sv403_sizreqbuf: DWORD - Size of each buffer (bytes)
- sv403_numbigbuf: DWORD - Number of 64K server buffers
